---
title: "bytefield"
---

Byte and packet layout diagrams from a compact DSL — @fig-tcp is the
classic TCP header. Click to zoom.

![TCP header layout](figures/tcp-header.bytefield){#fig-tcp}

[view source: `tcp-header.bytefield`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/site/gallery/figures/tcp-header.bytefield){.source-link}
